pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and receive latest framework features.
Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to compile and run on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 17.
